channel.title: Pages on ijadux2's website
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on ijadux2's website

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Hello, I’m Kumar Vaibhav

  • love to build
  • hands in config management
  • shell scripting
  • window managers
  • leraning Linux architecture
  • student

About Me

  • 💻 Using Neovim as my main editor
  • Linux user since - 🐧2020
  • 🔧 Building custom configurations and sharing them

Skills

  • Bash - Shell scripting for automation
  • Lua - Neovim plugin development
  • Python - Versatile programming
  • Linux - System administration
  • Nix - Declarative package management
  • Window Managers - Hyprland, Sway

Projects

Linux Development Environment

⚡ Neovim Configuration

Architecting a modular IDE experience. Built with Sharingan.nvim for maximum performance, this configuration transforms Neovim into a heavyweight development environment. It focuses on lightning-fast startup times, intuitive keybindings, and a decoupled plugin architecture.
